goal: Work-stealing handoff queue using per-file directory (not JSONL — decision per user 2026-04-18, see .planning/notes/2026-04-18-handoff-queue-design.md). Shape: .planning/handoffs/{open,claimed,closed}/ with one md file per handoff. Lifecycle = fs.rename between dirs (atomic on POSIX + Windows, no lock needed). Each file = YAML frontmatter {id, projectid, phase, task_id, created_at, created_by, claimed_by, claimed_at, completed_at, priority, estimated_context} + markdown body. CLI: gad handoffs {list,claim,complete,show,create}. gad-pause-work + gad-session pause invoke 'handoffs create'. gad startup/snapshot surface unclaimed count + top-3 summary. Idle agents pick appropriate items by estimated_context (mechanical→Haiku/Sonnet, reasoning→Opus per offload policy). Gap discovered: no 'gad tasks update <id> --goal' exists — surfaced in design note, file as follow-up. See .planning/notes/2026-04-18-handoff-queue-design.md for full schema.
